traits.name: Stand Firm
traits.text: While the Render is adjacent to an ally, it has +3 stability (4 total), can't be knocked prone, and can't be frightened.

traits.name: Nothing Left to Count
traits.text: While the Render is bloodied (winded), its abilities deal +3 damage, and allied Tallish within 5 squares ignore Measure Thrice — the heresy aura lets them bend without permission. (The +3 damage is automated on Spendthrift Bend via its winded tiers; the Measure Thrice exemption is manual.)

maneuver.name: Codified Edict
maneuver.effect: The Render moves up to its speed toward an enemy, then makes a free strike. Every ally adjacent to it when this maneuver starts may also move up to their speed. (Faction maneuver.)

effects.text: Move up to speed toward an enemy.
Free strike at the end of the move.
Codified Edict: every ally adjacent to the Render when the maneuver started may also move up to their speed (move them manually).

maneuver.name: Stone Surf (1/turn)
maneuver.effect: The Render shifts up to its speed along any worked stone, walls included. One adjacent ally may surf along with it. The pack rides the wave.

effects.text: Stone Surf: one ally adjacent at the start of the surf may shift along the same worked stone (move them manually). Path must follow worked stone.

action.name: Spendthrift Bend
action.effect: Tier 1 (≤11): 6 damage. Tier 2 (12–16): 9 damage, slide 2. Tier 3 (17+): 12 damage, slide 3. ALL TIERS: the target's square and all adjacent squares become permanent scree. Slides go away from the Render's allies (never strand its own cluster). While bloodied, all damage is +3 (Nothing Left to Count — automated). It deletes the map as it fights.

effects.text: Slide 2, away from the Render's allies.
Slide 3, away from the Render's allies.
Slide 2, away from the Render's allies.
Slide 3, away from the Render's allies.
SPENDTHRIFT BEND (all tiers): the target's square and every adjacent square become PERMANENT SCREE. Mark the map.

triggered_action.name: Squanderer's Mark (1/encounter)
triggered_action.trigger: The first push, pull, slide, or area effect used against the Render.
triggered_action.effect: The stone underneath the Render dies instead: the Render takes half damage from the triggering effect, ignores the forced movement, and its square becomes scree. It pays in stone, never in self.

cards.condition: First push/pull/slide or area effect against the Render

effects.text: SQUANDERER'S MARK: halve the damage from the triggering effect, cancel the forced movement (return the Render to its square if it was moved), and turn the Render's square into scree. 1/encounter — remove this trigger after use.
